name: OneMeta Inc.
summary: . The Company was originally incorporated as Promotions on Wheels Holdings, Inc., a Nevada corporation, on July 3, 2006. On December 26, 2008, the name of the Company was changed to Blindspot Alert, Inc. On September 11, 2009, the Companys name was changed to WebSafety, Inc. On March 23, 2021, the Companys name was changed to VeriDetx Corp. On June 8, 2021, the Companys name was changed to WebSafety, Inc.
